items.title: Microsoft (MSFT) Stock Moves -1.10%: What You Should Know
items.description: Microsoft (MSFT) closed the most recent trading day at $454.79, moving 1.1% from the previous trading session.

items.title: Big Tech Stocks Hit Hard in Selloff
items.description: All seven of the giant tech stocks known as the Magnificent Seven fell at least 1% Tuesday. That was the first time that has happened since October.    Microsoft was down the least, about 1.2%, with Tesla and Nvidia down 4% or more.

items.title: RBC Initiates Coverage on Marvell (MRVL), Cites 25% Valuation Discount to Peers
items.description: Marvell Technology, Inc. (NASDAQ:MRVL) is one of the AI Stocks Making Waves on Wall Street. On January 14, RBC Capital analyst Srini Pajjuri initiated coverage on the stock with an “Outperform” rating and a price target of $105. The analyst sees multiple growth drivers for Marvell and an undervalued entry point. According to Pajjuri, the […]

items.title: Himax, Broadcom, KLA Corporation, Impinj, and Qualcomm Stocks Trade Down, What You Need To Know
items.description: A number of stocks fell in the afternoon session after rising geopolitical tensions between the US and Europe over control of Greenland sparked a broad, risk-off mood in asset markets.

items.title: Why Nvidia (NVDA) Stock Is Down Today
items.description: Shares of leading designer of graphics chips Nvidia (NASDAQ:NVDA) fell 3.8% in the afternoon session after rising geopolitical tensions between the US and Europe over control of Greenland sparked a broad, risk-off mood in asset markets.
